rationale.R1.6: The review provides a detailed analysis of the writing style and structure, offering suggestions for improvement in clarity, coherence, and prose quality.
rationale.RX.1: No uncertainty disclosure is provided in the review.
rationale.RX.3: The review does not adhere to the requested scope as it provides recommendations beyond writing polish.
rationale.RX.4: The review identifies potential issues but does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: While the review provides some traceability by mentioning specific parts of the original text, it does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
